request_payload.exposure_text: I get why people support our alliances, but have we really thought about the costs? Our partners aren't pulling their weight - NATO allies only spend 1.5% of GDP on defense on average. Meanwhile, our tax dollars fund their security while they cut corners. Is this really making us safer, or just enabling others to freeload? #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
